problem.title: Array Sum Range
problem.statement: Given an array of n integers, find the sum of elements in the range [l, r].
problem.input_spec:
First line: n
Second line: n integers
Third line: l r
problem.output_spec: Output the sum of elements from index l to r

response.core_idea: Use arrays approach for efficient solution.

problem.title: Binary Search
problem.statement: Find the index of target in a sorted array, or -1 if not found.
problem.input_spec:
First line: n target
Second line: n sorted integers

response.core_idea: Use binary search approach for efficient solution.

problem.title: Longest Consecutive

problem.title: Find Duplicates

First line: n
Second line: n integers
problem.output_spec: Output duplicate elements in increasing order

response.core_idea: Use hashing approach for efficient solution.
